title: BitNet-TT session 8: Plan v4 Phase 1 — per-op RFE localization harness
goal: Build a per-op PCC/RFE localization harness that ranks tt-metal op contributions to the 0.019 PCC gap vs HF bf16 reference. Output: a ranked op-contribution table that gates Phase 2 kernel-rewrite target selection.
constraints: Capture intermediate tensor outputs from both TT and HF bf16 at identical layer boundaries.
Metric: relative Frobenius error (RFE) normalized by tensor RMS — composes via triangle inequality.
Multi-layer capture {0, 5, 15, 25, 29} — 5 distinct layers, NOT single-layer bootstrap.
N=10 runs × K=5 prompts = 50 samples per capture point.
3.32σ Bonferroni threshold across 55 cells (11 capture points × 5 layers); FWER=0.05.
Op classes: {linear-ish, norm, softmax/attention} — cross-class rankings require Jacobian caveat.
Fused QKV+RMSNorm boundary: either un-fused TT shadow path (preferred if ≤ 2 days) OR explicit non-decomposability annotation.
All measurements on TT server via ssh TT, git sync after each material change.

stories.title: Design harness data model + capture points
acceptanceCriteria: Enumerate the 11 capture points per transformer block (post-RMSNorm, post-QKV-proj, post-RoPE, post-SDPA, post-o_proj, post-residual-attn, post-RMSNorm-2, post-gate/up, post-SiLU-gate, post-down, post-residual-ffn).
Document how each maps to an HF bf16 reference tensor (which nn.Module output).
Flag the two fused op boundaries (fused QKV+RMSNorm, fused SDPA paged update) with shadow-path or non-decomposability note.

stories.title: Implement TT-side capture hooks
acceptanceCriteria: Add opt-in forward hook (BITNET_LOCALIZE=1 env) that, when set, captures each layer's intermediate tensors and dumps to .npy files or a single .npz per prompt×run.
Hooks fire on layers {0, 5, 15, 25, 29} only to keep storage bounded.
Does not alter compute; default OFF.

stories.title: Implement HF-side reference capture
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/pcc_localize.py --hf-capture loads HF bf16 model, runs forward with PyTorch hooks on identical 11×5 = 55 boundaries, dumps to /tmp/hf_localize_<prompt>_<run>.npz.
HF and TT tensors align in shape (after reshape to match fused-op layout), validated on a smoke run.

stories.title: Compute paired RFE + Bonferroni-ranked contribution table
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/pcc_localize.py --rank loads N=10 × K=5 paired samples for both TT and HF, computes RFE per capture point per layer.
Per-cell mean, std, 3.32σ bar evaluated against within-class noise floor (~0.002).
Output: docs/session_8_rfe_ranking.md with ranked table grouped by op class, flagging any cell that clears the 3.32σ bar.
Identify top-3 op contributors for Phase 2 target selection.

stories.title: Commit + push + sync TT; prepare Phase 2 PRD
acceptanceCriteria: All Phase 1 deliverables committed to origin/main.
Phase 2 target (top-1 ranked op) identified in the next PRD iteration.
